mapper.sql:
SELECT A.PERSON_NO AS APPLY_NO, 'PERSONAL' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, NULL AS CALLBACK, NULL AS EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.ADDRESS_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'ADDRESS' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.FAMILY_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'FAMILY' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_FAMILY_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.EMERGENCY_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'EMERGENCY' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.WORK_EXPER_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'WORK_EXP' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.EDUC_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'EDUCATION' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_EDUCATION_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(A.QUAL_NO) AS APPLY_NO, 'QUALIFICATION' AS APPLY_TABLE_TYPE, A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TYPE, A.CREATED_BY AS MANAGER_INFO, A.CALLBACK, A.EARROR, E.LOCAL_NAME AS EMP_NAME, E.EMPID AS EMP_CODE, D.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON A.PERSON_ID = E.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ACTIVITY = #{activitySearch, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO HR_PERSONAL_INFO T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, SEXCODE, DOB, NATION_CODE, NATIONALITY_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, WEDDING_DATE, IDCARD_NO, IDCARD_START_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, HOME_ADDRESS, EMAIL, EMAIL_SECOND, REG_PLACE, OFFICE_PHONE, HOME_PHONE, CELLPHONE, COMPANY_PHONE, HOUSE_TP, RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, EXIST_SINGLE, SING_ID, RELIGION, POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, CV_UPDATE_STATUS, ARMY_OR_NOT, OBSTACLE_OR_NOT FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY WHERE PERSON_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.PERSON_ID = S.PERSON_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE = S.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, T.SEXCODE = S.SEXCODE, T.DOB = S.DOB, T.NATION_CODE = S.NATION_CODE, T.NATIONALITY_CODE = S.NATIONALITY_CODE, T.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = S.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, T.WEDDING_DATE = S.WEDDING_DATE, T.IDCARD_NO = S.IDCARD_NO, T.IDCARD_START_DATE = S.IDCARD_START_DATE, T.ISSUING_AUTHORITY = S.ISSUING_AUTHORITY, T.HOME_ADDRESS = S.HOME_ADDRESS, T.EMAIL = S.EMAIL, T.EMAIL_SECOND = S.EMAIL_SECOND, T.REG_PLACE = S.REG_PLACE, T.OFFICE_PHONE = S.OFFICE_PHONE, T.HOME_PHONE = S.HOME_PHONE, T.CELLPHONE = S.CELLPHONE, T.COMPANY_PHONE = S.COMPANY_PHONE, T.HOUSE_TP = S.HOUSE_TP, T.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION = S.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, T.EXIST_SINGLE = S.EXIST_SINGLE, T.SING_ID = S.SING_ID, T.RELIGION = S.RELIGION, T.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = S.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, T.CV_UPDATE_STATUS = S.CV_UPDATE_STATUS, T.ARMY_OR_NOT = S.ARMY_OR_NOT, T.OBSTACLE_OR_NOT = S.OBSTACLE_OR_NOT, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( PERSON_ID, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, SEXCODE, DOB, NATION_CODE, NATIONALITY_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, WEDDING_DATE, IDCARD_NO, IDCARD_START_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, HOME_ADDRESS, EMAIL, EMAIL_SECOND, REG_PLACE, OFFICE_PHONE, HOME_PHONE, CELLPHONE, COMPANY_PHONE, HOUSE_TP, RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, EXIST_SINGLE, SING_ID, RELIGION, POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, CV_UPDATE_STATUS, ARMY_OR_NOT, OBSTACLE_OR_NOT, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( S.PERSON_ID, S.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, S.SEXCODE, S.DOB, S.NATION_CODE, S.NATIONALITY_CODE, S.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, S.WEDDING_DATE, S.IDCARD_NO, S.IDCARD_START_DATE, S.ISSUING_AUTHORITY, S.HOME_ADDRESS, S.EMAIL, S.EMAIL_SECOND, S.REG_PLACE, S.OFFICE_PHONE, S.HOME_PHONE, S.CELLPHONE, S.COMPANY_PHONE, S.HOUSE_TP, S.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, S.EXIST_SINGLE, S.SING_ID, S.RELIGION, S.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, S.CV_UPDATE_STATUS, S.ARMY_OR_NOT, S.OBSTACLE_OR_NOT, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )

MERGE INTO HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, ADDRESS_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, NATIONALITY, UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(ADDRESS_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.ADDRESS_NO = S.UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ADDRESS_TYPE = S.ADDRESS_TYPE, T.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = S.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, T.ADDRESS_CONTENT = S.ADDRESS_CONTENT, T.NATIONALITY = S.NATIONALITY, T.ACTIVITY = 1, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ADDRESS_NO, PERSON_ID, ADDRESS_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, ACTIVITY, NATIONALITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.ADDRESS_TYPE, S.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, S.ADDRESS_CONTENT, 1, S.NATIONALITY, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO HR_FAMILY T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, FAM_TYPE_CODE, FAM_NAME, FAM_BORNDATE, FAM_IDCARD, FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, FAM_COMPANY_NAME, LIVE_YN, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_PERSON_ID, FAM_ADDRESS, GENDER, FAM_EMAIL, OCUPATION, NOTE, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, NATIONALITY, WELFARE_TYPE, WORK_PHONE, AGE, EMERGENCY_LIAISON_OFFICE, UPDATE_FAMILY_NO FROM HR_FAMILY_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(FAMILY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.FAMILY_NO = S.UPDATE_FAMILY_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.FAM_TYPE_CODE = S.FAM_TYPE_CODE, T.FAM_NAME = S.FAM_NAME, T.FAM_BORNDATE = S.FAM_BORNDATE, T.FAM_IDCARD = S.FAM_IDCARD, T.FAM_PHONE = S.FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, T.FAM_COMPANY_NAME = S.FAM_COMPANY_NAME, T.LIVE_YN = S.LIVE_YN, T.EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN = S.EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, T.FAM_PERSON_ID = S.FAM_PERSON_ID, T.FAM_ADDRESS = S.FAM_ADDRESS, T.GENDER = S.GENDER, T.FAM_EMAIL = S.FAM_EMAIL, T.OCUPATION = S.OCUPATION, T.NOTE = S.NOTE, T.WELFARE_TYPE = S.WELFARE_TYPE, T.WORK_PHONE = S.WORK_PHONE, T.AGE = S.AGE, T.EMERGENCY_LIAISON_OFFICE= S.EMERGENCY_LIAISON_OFFICE, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( FAMILY_NO, PERSON_ID, FAM_TYPE_CODE, FAM_NAME, FAM_BORNDATE, FAM_IDCARD, FAM_PHONE, FAM_COMPANY_NAME, LIVE_YN, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_PERSON_ID, FAM_ADDRESS, GENDER, FAM_EMAIL, OCUPATION, NOTE, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_FAMILY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.FAM_TYPE_CODE, S.FAM_NAME, S.FAM_BORNDATE, S.FAM_IDCARD, S.FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, S.FAM_COMPANY_NAME, S.LIVE_YN, S.EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, S.FAM_PERSON_ID, S.FAM_ADDRESS, S.GENDER, S.FAM_EMAIL, S.OCUPATION, S.NOTE, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, EMER_NAME, EMER_PHONE, EMER_PHONE_SECOND, EMER_EMAIL, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, EMER_ADDRESS, EMER_TYPE_CODE, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, NATIONALITY, EMER_CELLPHONE, EMER_WORK_PHONE, UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(EMERGENCY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.EMERGENCY_NO = S.UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.EMER_NAME = S.EMER_NAME, T.EMER_PHONE = S.EMER_PHONE, T.EMER_PHONE_SECOND = S.EMER_PHONE_SECOND, T.EMER_EMAIL = S.EMER_EMAIL, T.MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE = S.MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, T.EMER_ADDRESS = S.EMER_ADDRESS, T.EMER_TYPE_CODE = S.EMER_TYPE_CODE, T.ISEMERGENCYADDRESS = S.ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, T.NATIONALITY = S.NATIONALITY, T.EMER_CELLPHONE = S.EMER_CELLPHONE, T.EMER_WORK_PHONE = S.EMER_WORK_PHONE, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( EMERGENCY_NO, PERSON_ID, EMER_NAME, EMER_PHONE, EMER_PHONE_SECOND, EMER_EMAIL, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, EMER_ADDRESS, EMER_TYPE_CODE, ACTIVITY, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, NATIONALITY, EMER_CELLPHONE, EMER_WORK_PHONE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.EMER_NAME, S.EMER_PHONE, S.EMER_PHONE_SECOND, S.EMER_EMAIL, S.MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, S.EMER_ADDRESS, S.EMER_TYPE_CODE, 1, S.ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, S.NATIONALITY, S.EMER_CELLPHONE, S.EMER_WORK_PHONE, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, CPNY_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POSITION, DUTY, PAY_YEAR, RESIGN_REASON, WITNESS, TEL, AGE_LIMIT, WORK_ADDRESS, SENIORITY_RESPONSE, NATIONALITY, OVERSEAS, REMARK, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, START_DATE, END_DATE, ORDERNO, UPDATE_WORK_EXPER_NO FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(WORK_EXPER_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.WORK_EXPER_NO = S.UPDATE_WORK_EXPER_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CPNY_NAME = S.CPNY_NAME, T.DEPT_NAME = S.DEPT_NAME, T.POSITION = S.POSITION, T.DUTY = S.DUTY, T.PAY_YEAR = S.PAY_YEAR, T.RESIGN_REASON = S.RESIGN_REASON, T.WITNESS = S.WITNESS, T.CELLPHONE = S.TEL, T.AGE_LIMIT = S.AGE_LIMIT, T.WORK_ADDRESS = S.WORK_ADDRESS, T.SENIORITY_RESPONSE = S.SENIORITY_RESPONSE, T.NATIONALITY = S.NATIONALITY, T.OVERSEAS = S.OVERSEAS, T.REMARK = S.REMARK, T.START_MONTH = S.START_MONTH, T.END_MONTH = S.END_MONTH, T.START_DATE = S.START_DATE, T.END_DATE = S.END_DATE, T.ORDERNO = S.ORDERNO, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( WORK_EXPER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POSITION, DUTY, PAY_YEAR, RESIGN_REASON, WITNESS, CELLPHONE, AGE_LIMIT, WORK_ADDRESS, SENIORITY_RESPONSE, REMARK, OVERSEAS, NATIONALITY, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, START_DATE, END_DATE, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( HR_W_EXP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.CPNY_NAME, S.DEPT_NAME, S.POSITION, S.DUTY, S.PAY_YEAR, S.RESIGN_REASON, S.WITNESS, S.TEL, S.AGE_LIMIT, S.WORK_ADDRESS, S.SENIORITY_RESPONSE, S.REMARK, S.OVERSEAS, S.NATIONALITY, S.START_MONTH, S.END_MONTH, S.START_DATE, S.END_DATE, S.ORDERNO, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )

MERGE INTO HR_EDUCATION T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, SUBJECT, DEGREE_CODE, SUBJECT_SECOND, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, DEGREES_CODE, INSTITUTION_NAME, EDU_DEG_NUM, SITE_COUNTRY, REMARKS AS REMARK_VAL, ORDERNO, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, PLACE, STUDY_EXPERIENCE, START_DATE, END_DATE, UPDATE_EDUC_NO FROM HR_EDUCATION_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(EDUC_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.EDUC_NO = S.UPDATE_EDUC_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.SUBJECT = S.SUBJECT, T.DEGREE_CODE = S.DEGREE_CODE, T.SUBJECT_SECOND = S.SUBJECT_SECOND, T.FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER= S.FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, T.DEGREES_CODE = S.DEGREES_CODE, T.INSTITUTION_NAME = S.INSTITUTION_NAME, T.EDU_DEG_NUM = S.EDU_DEG_NUM, T.SITE_COUNTRY = S.SITE_COUNTRY, T.REMARK = S.REMARK_VAL, T.ORDERNO = S.ORDERNO, T.FILE_URL = S.FILE_URL, T.FILE_NAME = S.FILE_NAME, T.PLACE = S.PLACE, T.STUDY_EXPERIENCE = S.STUDY_EXPERIENCE, T.START_DATE = S.START_DATE, T.END_DATE = S.END_DATE, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( EDUC_NO, PERSON_ID, DEGREE_CODE, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, DEGREES_CODE, INSTITUTION_NAME, SUBJECT, START_DATE, END_DATE, SUBJECT_SECOND, EDU_DEG_NUM, SITE_COUNTRY, REMARK, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PLACE, STUDY_EXPERIENCE, FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_EDU_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.DEGREE_CODE, S.FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, S.DEGREES_CODE, S.INSTITUTION_NAME, S.SUBJECT, S.START_DATE, S.END_DATE, S.SUBJECT_SECOND, S.EDU_DEG_NUM, S.SITE_COUNTRY, S.REMARK_VAL, S.ORDERNO, 1, S.PLACE, S.STUDY_EXPERIENCE, S.FILE_NAME, S.FILE_URL, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO HR_QUALIFICATION T USING ( SELECT PERSON_ID, QUAL_NAME, DATE_OBTAINED, QUAL_CARD_NO, QUAL_INSTITUTE, VALIDITY_DATE, ACQUISITION_MODES, QUAL_LEVEL, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, QUAL_REMARK, QUAL_GRADE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, ORDERNO, UPDATE_QUAL_NO FROM HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY WHERE TO_CHAR(QUAL_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) S ON (T.QUAL_NO = S.UPDATE_QUAL_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.QUAL_NAME = S.QUAL_NAME, T.DATE_OBTAINED = S.DATE_OBTAINED, T.QUAL_CARD_NO = S.QUAL_CARD_NO, T.QUAL_INSTITUTE = S.QUAL_INSTITUTE, T.VALIDITY_DATE = S.VALIDITY_DATE, T.ACQUISITION_MODES = S.ACQUISITION_MODES, T.QUAL_LEVEL = S.QUAL_LEVEL, T.PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N = S.PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, T.QUAL_REMARK = S.QUAL_REMARK, T.QUAL_GRADE = S.QUAL_GRADE, T.FILE_URL = S.FILE_URL, T.FILE_NAME = S.FILE_NAME, T.ORDERNO = S.ORDERNO, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( QUAL_NO, PERSON_ID, QUAL_NAME, DATE_OBTAINED, QUAL_CARD_NO, QUAL_INSTITUTE, VALIDITY_DATE, ACQUISITION_MODES, QUAL_LEVEL, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, QUAL_REMARK, QUAL_GRADE, FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( hr_qualification_apply_seq.NEXTVAL, S.PERSON_ID, S.QUAL_NAME, S.DATE_OBTAINED, S.QUAL_CARD_NO, S.QUAL_INSTITUTE, S.VALIDITY_DATE, S.ACQUISITION_MODES, S.QUAL_LEVEL, S.PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, S.QUAL_REMARK, S.QUAL_GRADE, S.FILE_NAME, S.FILE_URL, S.ORDERNO, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(P.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE) AS "finalDegreeCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "finalDegreeName", TO_CHAR(P.SEXCODE) AS "sexCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "sexName", TO_CHAR(P.DOB, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS "dob", TO_CHAR(P.NATION_CODE) AS "nationCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.NATION_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "nationName", TO_CHAR(P.NATIONALITY_CODE) AS "nationalityCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.NATIONALITY_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "nationalityName", TO_CHAR(P.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE) AS "maritalStatusCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "maritalStatusName", TO_CHAR(P.WEDDING_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS "weddingDate", P.IDCARD_NO AS "idcardNo", P.IDCARD_START_DATE AS "idcardStartDate", P.ISSUING_AUTHORITY AS "issuingAuthority", P.HOME_ADDRESS AS "homeAddress", P.EMAIL AS "email", P.EMAIL_SECOND AS "emailSecond", P.REG_PLACE AS "regPlace", P.OFFICE_PHONE AS "officePhone", P.HOME_PHONE AS "homePhone", P.CELLPHONE AS "cellphone", P.COMPANY_PHONE AS "companyPhone", P.HOUSE_TP AS "houseTp", P.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION AS "residentialDistinction", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "residentialDistinctionName", P.EXIST_SINGLE AS "existSingle", P.SING_ID AS "singId", P.RELIGION AS "religion", P.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK AS "politicalOutlook", P.CV_UPDATE_STATUS AS "cvUpdateStatus", P.ARMY_OR_NOT AS "armyOrNot", P.OBSTACLE_OR_NOT AS "obstacleOrNot" FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO P INNER JOIN HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY A ON P.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID WHERE A.PERSON_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND P.ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(M.ADDRESS_NO) AS "addressNo", TO_CHAR(M.ADDRESS_TYPE) AS "addressType", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(M.ADDRESS_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "addressTypeName", M.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS "effectiveStartDate", M.ADDRESS_CONTENT AS "addressContent", M.NATIONALITY AS "nationality" FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS M INNER JOIN HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY A ON M.ADDRESS_NO = A.UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.ADDRESS_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO IS NOT NULL AND M.ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(F.FAMILY_NO) AS "familyNo", TO_CHAR(F.FAM_TYPE_CODE) AS "famTypeCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(F.FAM_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "famTypeName", F.FAM_NAME AS "famName", TO_CHAR(F.FAM_BORNDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS "famBorndate", F.FAM_IDCARD AS "famIdcard", F.FAM_PHONE AS "famFamilyPhone", F.FAM_COMPANY_NAME AS "famCompanyName", F.LIVE_YN AS "liveYn", F.EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN AS "emergencyContactYn", F.FAM_PERSON_ID AS "famPersonId", F.FAM_ADDRESS AS "famAddress", F.GENDER AS "gender", F.FAM_EMAIL AS "famEmail", F.OCUPATION AS "ocupation", F.NOTE AS "note", F.NATIONALITY AS "nationality" FROM HR_FAMILY F INNER JOIN HR_FAMILY_APPLY A ON F.FAMILY_NO = A.UPDATE_FAMILY_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.FAMILY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_FAMILY_NO IS NOT NULL AND (F.ACTIVITY = 1 OR F.ACTIVITY IS NULL)

SELECT TO_CHAR(E.EMERGENCY_NO) AS "emergencyNo", E.EMER_NAME AS "emerName", E.EMER_PHONE AS "emerPhone", E.EMER_PHONE_SECOND AS "emerPhoneSecond", E.EMER_EMAIL AS "emerEmail", E.MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE AS "mainLiaisonOffice", E.EMER_ADDRESS AS "emerAddress", TO_CHAR(E.EMER_TYPE_CODE) AS "emerTypeCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.EMER_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "emerTypeName", E.ISEMERGENCYADDRESS AS "isEmergencyAddress", E.NATIONALITY AS "nationality", E.EMER_CELLPHONE AS "emerCellphone", E.EMER_WORK_PHONE AS "emerWorkPhone" FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS E INNER JOIN HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY A ON E.EMERGENCY_NO = A.UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.EMERGENCY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO IS NOT NULL AND (E.ACTIVITY = 1 OR E.ACTIVITY IS NULL)

SELECT TO_CHAR(W.WORK_EXPER_NO) AS "workExperNo", W.CPNY_NAME AS "cpnyName", W.DEPT_NAME AS "deptName", W.POSITION AS "position", W.DUTY AS "duty", W.PAY_YEAR AS "payYear", W.RESIGN_REASON AS "resignReason", W.WITNESS AS "witness", W.CELLPHONE AS "tel", W.AGE_LIMIT AS "ageLimit", W.WORK_ADDRESS AS "workAddress", W.SENIORITY_RESPONSE AS "seniorityResponse", W.NATIONALITY AS "nationality", W.OVERSEAS AS "overseas", W.REMARK AS "remark", W.START_MONTH AS "startMonth", W.END_MONTH AS "endMonth", W.START_DATE AS "startDate", W.END_DATE AS "endDate" FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE W INNER JOIN HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_APPLY A ON W.WORK_EXPER_NO = A.UPDATE_WORK_EXPER_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.WORK_EXPER_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_WORK_EXPER_NO IS NOT NULL AND W.ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(E.EDUC_NO) AS "educNo", E.SUBJECT AS "subject", TO_CHAR(E.DEGREE_CODE) AS "degreeCode", GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS "degreeName", E.SUBJECT_SECOND AS "subjectSecond", E.FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER AS "finalDegreeWhether", E.DEGREES_CODE AS "degreesCode", E.INSTITUTION_NAME AS "institutionName", E.EDU_DEG_NUM AS "eduDegNum", E.SITE_COUNTRY AS "siteCountry", E.REMARK AS "remarks", E.ORDERNO AS "orderno", E.FILE_URL AS "fileUrl", E.FILE_NAME AS "fileName", E.PLACE AS "place", E.STUDY_EXPERIENCE AS "studyExperience", E.START_DATE AS "startDate", E.END_DATE AS "endDate" FROM HR_EDUCATION E INNER JOIN HR_EDUCATION_APPLY A ON E.EDUC_NO = A.UPDATE_EDUC_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.EDUC_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_EDUC_NO IS NOT NULL AND E.ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(Q.QUAL_NO) AS "qualNo", Q.QUAL_NAME AS "qualName", Q.DATE_OBTAINED AS "dateObtained", Q.QUAL_CARD_NO AS "qualCardNo", Q.QUAL_INSTITUTE AS "qualInstitute", Q.VALIDITY_DATE AS "validityDate", Q.ACQUISITION_MODES AS "acquisitionModes", Q.QUAL_LEVEL AS "qualLevel", Q.PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N AS "paymentAllowanceYN", Q.QUAL_REMARK AS "qualRemark", Q.QUAL_GRADE AS "qualGrade", Q.FILE_URL AS "fileUrl", Q.FILE_NAME AS "fileName", Q.ORDERNO AS "orderno" FROM HR_QUALIFICATION Q INNER JOIN HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY A ON Q.QUAL_NO = A.UPDATE_QUAL_NO WHERE TO_CHAR(A.QUAL_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.UPDATE_QUAL_NO IS NOT NULL AND Q.ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_FAMILY_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_EDUCATION_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 )
